meaning: n.诉苦,抱怨,牢骚,委屈,疾病
examples: You have no grounds for complaint.
I can see no grounds for complaint.
He fired off a letter of complaint.
Well, its competitors have a complaint: that its tax-exempt status gives it an unfair advantage.
The money came from investors who had invested with Madoff through Cohmad, according to the complaint.
